author: gcolvin
content:
8173 is an Informationl EIP, but the Walidater is demanding Specification, Rationale, and Security sections, which are irrelevant. And it is complaining about the sections it does have: Historical Context, Technical Foundations, Relationship to Ethereum Scaling, Conclusion, and References.  What to do?
https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11353
